meta.title: Canada & New England Cruise — Travel Document Vault
meta.note: First-pass inventory of every reservation, ticket, pass, and confirmation across the trip. 'status' tracks where each document stands: confirmed = booked with a reference number on file; pending = booked or arranged but the number / downloadable document is not yet captured; gap = not booked, unknown, or needs a decision. Sensitive fields (confirmation numbers, file links) are crew-only and reveal after sign-in.

statuses.pending: Booked or arranged — number / document still to collect
statuses.gap: Not booked, unknown, or needs a decision

documents.title: Delta — Greensboro → Montreal
documents.notes: DL 3052 GSO→ATL (12:26 PM), then DL 2665 ATL→YUL (arr 5:45 PM). Seats 17E (Jett) & 17D (Laura), Delta Main. Total 5h 19m.

documents.title: American — Boston → Greensboro
documents.notes: AA 3043 BOS→PHL (12:32 PM), then AA 5518 PHL→GSO (arr 5:02 PM, operated by PSA as American Eagle). 1h 12m connection at PHL.

documents.title: Flights into Montreal (YUL)
documents.notes: Land at YUL ~11:00 AM Jun 11 to pick up the rental. Airline & confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: Flight into Montreal (YUL)
documents.notes: Lands at YUL ~5:00 PM Jun 11 (same arrival window as Jett & Laura). Airline & confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: ms Zuiderdam — Stateroom 5161
documents.notes: Cabin 5161, Deck 5. Have It All package. Complete Online Check-In by Jun 10 to generate the boarding pass & luggage tags.

documents.title: ms Zuiderdam — Sandra & Becca's stateroom
documents.notes: Have It All package. Complete Online Check-In by Jun 10 to generate the boarding pass & luggage tags.

documents.title: ms Zuiderdam — Karen's stateroom
documents.notes: Have It All package. Complete Online Check-In by Jun 10 to generate the boarding pass & luggage tags.

documents.title: Montreal pre-cruise hotel
documents.notes: Humaniti Hotel Montreal — Autograph Collection by Marriott, 340 de la Gauchetière O, Montreal. Confirmed booking for the pre-cruise stay June 11.

documents.title: Les Lofts St-Pierre — Old Quebec
documents.notes: Two units booked: SP304 (Jett & Laura), SP109 (Sandra, Becca & Karen). Confirmation numbers not yet recorded.

documents.title: Boston Harbor Hotel — birthday night
documents.notes: 70 Rowes Wharf. Two City Superior King rooms. Check-in Sat Jun 20 3:00 PM, check-out Sun Jun 21 12:00 PM. Daily breakfast for 2 per room, $100 property credit, welcome amenity, Wi-Fi. Free cancellation until Thu Jun 18 12:00 AM property local time.

documents.title: Rental car — Montreal → Quebec City
documents.notes: Pick up at YUL Jun 11; return at Québec City (YQB) Jun 12 evening. Used for the Montreal→Quebec scenic drive. Rental company & confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: Minivan rental — PEI driving loop
documents.vendor: PEI Car Rental, 18 Queen St, Charlottetown
documents.notes: Pick up ~9:15 AM in Charlottetown for the ~119 km island loop; return before all-aboard (port 7am–5pm). Confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: Historic Quebec & Montmorency Falls (optional)
documents.notes: Optional embarkation-day tour. Not confirmed — decide whether to book.

documents.title: Charlottetown GPS scavenger-hunt unit
documents.notes: Becca picks up the self-guided GPS unit ~8:30 AM. Booking/confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: Sydney — Highland Village & Gaelic Experience
documents.notes: 11:30 AM–3:00 PM ship tour through the Bras d'Or Lakes to the Highland Village living-history museum. Confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: Halifax Coastal — Peggy's Cove & Lunenburg
documents.notes: 8:30 AM–4:00 PM private tour: Lunenburg (UNESCO) → Mahone Bay → Peggy's Cove → optional Citadel. Booked through Viator (not Holland America) — keep the Viator voucher handy. Confirmation not yet recorded.

documents.title: Portland, Maine — day in port
documents.notes: In port 12:30 PM–10:00 PM. Nothing booked. Suggested self-guided: Portland Head Light + Old Port. No document required unless a tour is added.

documents.title: Pinnacle Grill dinner
documents.notes: 6:00 PM, Laura's booking (redeems the Have It All specialty dinner). Reservation number not yet recorded.

documents.title: Seafood Boil specialty dinner
documents.notes: 5:15 PM New England-style specialty dinner aboard. Attendees & reservation number not yet recorded.

documents.title: Greenhouse Spa — couples massage
documents.notes: 10:30 AM couples massage (sea day). Reservation number not yet recorded.

documents.title: Passports (all 5 travellers)
documents.notes: Required document for this cross-border Canada/USA cruise. Store a scan of each as backup; check expiry well before sailing.

documents.title: Holland America Online Check-In
documents.notes: Must be completed by Jun 10 for all three staterooms. Produces the boarding pass + luggage tags tracked under each Cruise record.

documents.title: Travel insurance
documents.notes: Not referenced anywhere in the trip plan. Confirm whether anyone holds a policy (or a card with travel coverage) and store the document + 24h assistance number.
